lesson: Two blocks are stacked, with the lower block on a frictionless table and the upper block on top of it. The lower block has mass m2 = 3m1. A horizontal force F = 30 N is applied to the lower block. If the coefficient of static friction between the two blocks is mu_s = 0.25, what is the maximum value of m1, in kilograms, for which the two blocks move together without slipping? Take g = 9.8 m/s^2.
